---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Data Received - Full RNA-seq Data for Andy Dittman and NOAA
date: '2026-07-15'
draft: false
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "Data Received"
  - "RNA-seq"
  - "2026"
---
# INTRO

Received RNA-seq data for Andy Dittman at NOAA from UW's Northwest Genomics Center. [This is part of a project initiated a while ago](https://github.com/RobertsLab/resources/issues/2397) (GitHub Issue). The initial RNA submitted was potentially questionable, based on Bionalyzer RIN scores and [a subset of the data was previously received on 20260508](../2026-05-08-Data-Received---RNA-seq-Subset-for-Andy-Dittman-and-NOAA/index.qmd) (Notebook entry) and [QC'd on 20260519](../2026-05-19-FastQC-MultiQC---Andy-Dittman-Preliminary-RNA-seq-Data-on-Hyak/index.qmd) (Notebook entry). This is the remainder of the data that was sequenced and received.

# DATA

Data was downloaded to our server, Owl, via GlobusConnect. It took a full 24hrs to complete.

Data is currently available at:

- [https://owl.fish.washington.edu/nightingales/dittman_grc_rnaseq_1/](https://owl.fish.washington.edu/nightingales/dittman_grc_rnaseq_1/)

MD5 checksums were verified:


```bash
lib_213507_sample_1703710_S21_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213524_sample_1703765_S143_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213501_sample_1703771_S148_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213492_sample_1703673_S126_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213476_sample_1703761_S139_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213518_sample_1703702_S14_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213562_sample_1703786_S64_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213525_sample_1703773_S53_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213489_sample_1703770_S147_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213557_sample_1703740_S42_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213487_sample_1703753_S132_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213567_sample_1703719_S26_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213554_sample_1703705_S17_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213566_sample_1703706_S18_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213528_sample_1703679_S129_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213513_sample_1703772_S52_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213508_sample_1703727_S30_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213546_sample_1703749_S49_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213485_sample_1703734_S36_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213529_sample_1703694_S7_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213510_sample_1703744_S46_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213565_sample_1703698_S10_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213498_sample_1703743_S45_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213542_sample_1703704_S16_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213508_sample_1703727_S30_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213553_sample_1703696_S9_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213493_sample_1703689_S4_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213550_sample_1703785_S63_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213515_sample_1703790_S66_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213510_sample_1703744_S46_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213504_sample_1703675_S127_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213473_sample_1703732_S35_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213520_sample_1703728_S31_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213517_sample_1703693_S6_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213483_sample_1703707_S19_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213534_sample_1703747_S48_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213541_sample_1703695_S8_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213486_sample_1703742_S44_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213524_sample_1703765_S143_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213545_sample_1703739_S41_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213479_sample_1703787_S149_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213543_sample_1703715_S24_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213496_sample_1703726_S29_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213553_sample_1703696_S9_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213566_sample_1703706_S18_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213476_sample_1703761_S139_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213494_sample_1703700_S12_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213549_sample_1703775_S55_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213539_sample_1703792_S68_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213555_sample_1703717_S25_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213538_sample_1703784_S62_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213498_sample_1703743_S45_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213489_sample_1703770_S147_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213478_sample_1703777_S57_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213497_sample_1703735_S37_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213504_sample_1703675_S127_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213519_sample_1703711_S22_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213537_sample_1703774_S54_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213555_sample_1703717_S25_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213531_sample_1703713_S23_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213522_sample_1703746_S47_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213474_sample_1703741_S43_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213544_sample_1703730_S33_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213532_sample_1703729_S32_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213474_sample_1703741_S43_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213543_sample_1703715_S24_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213514_sample_1703781_S60_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213497_sample_1703735_S37_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213516_sample_1703676_S128_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213509_sample_1703736_S38_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213558_sample_1703750_S50_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213490_sample_1703778_S58_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213517_sample_1703693_S6_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213522_sample_1703746_S47_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213487_sample_1703753_S132_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213539_sample_1703792_S68_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213530_sample_1703703_S15_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213514_sample_1703781_S60_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213495_sample_1703709_S20_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213482_sample_1703699_S11_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213473_sample_1703732_S35_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213494_sample_1703700_S12_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213513_sample_1703772_S52_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213552_sample_1703684_S1_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213519_sample_1703711_S22_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213503_sample_1703789_S65_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213565_sample_1703698_S10_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213546_sample_1703749_S49_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213525_sample_1703773_S53_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213496_sample_1703726_S29_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213560_sample_1703768_S146_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213521_sample_1703737_S39_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213532_sample_1703729_S32_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213482_sample_1703699_S11_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213521_sample_1703737_S39_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213533_sample_1703738_S40_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213551_sample_1703793_S69_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213516_sample_1703676_S128_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213545_sample_1703739_S41_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213540_sample_1703680_S130_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213560_sample_1703768_S146_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213564_sample_1703685_S2_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213548_sample_1703767_S145_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213523_sample_1703756_S135_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213475_sample_1703751_S131_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213533_sample_1703738_S40_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213531_sample_1703713_S23_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213512_sample_1703764_S142_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213536_sample_1703766_S144_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213528_sample_1703679_S129_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213559_sample_1703760_S138_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213534_sample_1703747_S48_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213535_sample_1703757_S136_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213495_sample_1703709_S20_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213526_sample_1703782_S61_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213550_sample_1703785_S63_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213558_sample_1703750_S50_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213523_sample_1703756_S135_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213511_sample_1703755_S134_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213556_sample_1703731_S34_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213491_sample_1703788_S150_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213559_sample_1703760_S138_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213483_sample_1703707_S19_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213551_sample_1703793_S69_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213505_sample_1703692_S5_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213544_sample_1703730_S33_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213547_sample_1703758_S137_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213529_sample_1703694_S7_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213503_sample_1703789_S65_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213500_sample_1703763_S141_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213515_sample_1703790_S66_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213499_sample_1703754_S133_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213556_sample_1703731_S34_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213492_sample_1703673_S126_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213506_sample_1703701_S13_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213567_sample_1703719_S26_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213472_sample_1703724_S27_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213518_sample_1703702_S14_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213485_sample_1703734_S36_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213493_sample_1703689_S4_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213554_sample_1703705_S17_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213478_sample_1703777_S57_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213537_sample_1703774_S54_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213472_sample_1703724_S27_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213507_sample_1703710_S21_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213502_sample_1703779_S59_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213502_sample_1703779_S59_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213535_sample_1703757_S136_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213501_sample_1703771_S148_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213490_sample_1703778_S58_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213547_sample_1703758_S137_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213509_sample_1703736_S38_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213484_sample_1703725_S28_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213491_sample_1703788_S150_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213486_sample_1703742_S44_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213499_sample_1703754_S133_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213527_sample_1703791_S67_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213475_sample_1703751_S131_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213506_sample_1703701_S13_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213480_sample_1703672_S125_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213538_sample_1703784_S62_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213481_sample_1703686_S3_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213477_sample_1703769_S51_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213526_sample_1703782_S61_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213564_sample_1703685_S2_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213563_sample_1703794_S70_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213477_sample_1703769_S51_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213549_sample_1703775_S55_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213536_sample_1703766_S144_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213511_sample_1703755_S134_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213540_sample_1703680_S130_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213480_sample_1703672_S125_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213520_sample_1703728_S31_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213505_sample_1703692_S5_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213488_sample_1703762_S140_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213552_sample_1703684_S1_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213512_sample_1703764_S142_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213488_sample_1703762_S140_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213479_sample_1703787_S149_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213561_sample_1703776_S56_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213541_sample_1703695_S8_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213548_sample_1703767_S145_L002_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213557_sample_1703740_S42_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213542_sample_1703704_S16_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213561_sample_1703776_S56_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213500_sample_1703763_S141_L002_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213530_sample_1703703_S15_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213562_sample_1703786_S64_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213563_sample_1703794_S70_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213527_sample_1703791_S67_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213484_sample_1703725_S28_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
lib_213481_sample_1703686_S3_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz: OK
```
